headline: Assessing Arista Networks (ANET) Valuation As Mixed Short-Term Returns Meet Strong Long-Term Momentum
summary: Why Arista Networks Is On Investors’ Radar Today Arista Networks (ANET) is drawing attention after a period of mixed recent returns, with the stock up over the past month but slightly lower over the past week. That mixed picture is prompting fresh interest. See our latest analysis for Arista Networks. The recent 3.2% 1 day share price return, combined with a 5.9% 30 day share price return, sits alongside a 65.3% 1 year total shareholder return and a very large 5 year total shareholder return...
